landing.hero_title: Get More 5-Star Google Reviews from Happy Customers

landing.client1_desc: Walk-ins up 45% after placing the standee
landing.test1_text: We kept asking customers for reviews — nobody had time. The moment we placed the standee, reviews started coming in while customers waited. Our rating hit 4.8 and walk-ins jumped 45%!
landing.test2_text: As a farm business, trust is everything. The standee helped us collect genuine reviews from visitors, and our weekend sales went up by 30%. Best ₹999 we ever spent.
landing.test3_text: Foreign tourists now find us on Google Maps first. We hit #1 ranking in our area within a month. The standee just sits there and does all the work.
landing.test4_text: Our café is always packed. Customers scan the QR while sipping chai and leave a review before they leave. It's become effortless — like magic.
landing.test5_text: We've been around for generations, but the young crowd checks Google first. The standee helped us collect 200+ reviews and stay relevant in the digital age.

pricing.title: PRICING
pricing.subtitle: No subscriptions, no hidden fees. Just one powerful QR standee.

faq.title: Got Questions?
faq.subtitle: We've got answers
faq.q1: What exactly do I get for ₹999?
faq.a1: You get a premium physical QR standee customized for your business. Place it at your counter — customers scan it and post honest Google reviews with editable writing help. That's it. No app, no subscription.
faq.q2: Do I need any technical knowledge?
faq.a2: Zero. We deliver the standee, you place it at your counter. Your customers do the rest. We also include a setup guide with every order.
faq.q3: How does a QR standee help my Google ranking?
faq.a3: Google ranks businesses higher when they receive frequent, genuine and useful customer reviews. Every time a customer uses your standee, they post a review with honest customer-written text — helping you climb the rankings automatically.
faq.q4: Is there any monthly or hidden fee?
faq.a4: No. ₹999 is a one-time payment. You get the physical QR standee with 3 years of review idea generation support. No renewals, no surprises.
